cases.prompt: Older single family homes in Skagit County built before 1980 with garage area that could be remodel candidates.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH filtered_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS land_use_code,
    ps.primary_actual_year_built,
    ps.total_garage_area,
    ps.primary_building_improvement_value,
    'Built before or in 1980 with garage area > 0' AS match_reasons
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
  WHERE
    ps.primary_actual_year_built IS NOT NULL
    AND ps.primary_actual_year_built <= 1980
    AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
    AND COALESCE(ps.total_garage_area, 0) > 0
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  land_use,
  land_use_code,
  primary_actual_year_built,
  total_garage_area,
  primary_building_improvement_value,
  match_reasons
FROM filtered_parcels
ORDER BY primary_actual_year_built ASC
cases.title: Older Single Family Homes in Skagit County Built Before 1980 with Garage Area for Remodel Candidates
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with primary_actual_year_built before or equal to 1980, land use codes for single family residences (110, 111, 112, 113), with garage area greater than zero, indicating potential remodel candidates.
